statement.en: Kinetostatic analysis of a class of planar 2-DOF tensegrity manipulators

proposer: Antoine Lenoir, Christine Chevallereau, Alexandre Pitti et al.

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: This is a preprint dated 2026-04-25 (future-dated or fictional timestamp) describing a technical contribution in tensegrity manipulator kinetostatics. The axiom itself—that planar 2-DOF tensegrity systems admit tractable kinetostatic analysis—is provisionally supported by the claimed work but not yet validated through peer review, replication, or independent confirmation. The status is 'under change' pending publication and community assessment.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 張力とトルクの調和は、幾何学的な角度に隠された単一の比率として踊る。

visualGlyph.interpretation: 中心の剛体は、張力に引かれた糸によって宙に保たれ、自由度は幾何学的な張力のバレエである。
